goal: Unify Signal Tree (/graph/flow) visual identity with Neural Lattice (/graph) plus graph intelligence and scale perf.
constraints: Small atomic commits with explicit verification

SC-1.title: Glassmorphism nodes with type-color glow
SC-1.verification: Nodes semi-transparent with backdrop blur; outer glow matches node type accent

SC-2.title: Animated SVG signal edges (speed ∝ importance)
SC-2.verification: Marching dash animation on parent→child edges; higher importance = faster duration

SC-3.title: BFS flags cyclic edges for dashed render
SC-3.verification: Circular dependency shows purple dashed edge without layout break

SC-4.title: View in Lattice fly-to 3D camera
SC-4.verification: Button triggers smooth camera glide to node in 3D lattice

SC-5.title: BFS tree transform in Web Worker
SC-5.verification: Graphs ≥80 nodes offload index/tree build to worker

SC-6.title: Dagre layout memoized by graph fingerprint
SC-6.verification: Re-render without data change skips dagre.layout
